factors.name: Momentum 5d
factors.description: 5-day price momentum (annualized). Measures short-term price trend — are buyers or sellers in control right now?

factors.name: Momentum 21d
factors.description: 21-day price momentum (annualized). The medium-term trend — where has this ETF been heading over the past month?

factors.name: Mean Reversion
factors.description: RSI-based mean reversion signal. Positive = oversold (potential bounce), Negative = overbought (potential pullback). Contra-trend opportunity indicator.

factors.name: Vol Regime
factors.description: Volatility regime: is short-term vol expanding or compressing vs the 63-day baseline? Compressing vol = calmer markets ahead (bullish). Expanding = uncertainty rising.

factors.name: Vol Thrust
factors.description: Volume thrust: is today's trading volume unusually high, and in which direction? High volume on up moves confirms the trend. High vol on down moves = selling pressure.

factors.name: Trend Quality
factors.description: ADX-based trend quality. High positive score = strong uptrend. High negative = strong downtrend. Near zero = choppy/sideways — no clear direction.

factors.name: Rel Strength
factors.description: 21-day return vs SPY (alpha). Which sectors are beating the market? Positive = outperforming SPY, Negative = lagging behind.

factors.name: 52w Recovery
factors.description: Position within 52-week price range. +50 = at 52-week high. -50 = at 52-week low. Shows where prices are relative to a full year of history — high scores suggest strength, low scores suggest potential deep value.
